technical.lead: Bukas ang Mag 7 earnings week ngayong 4/27 habang lumalamig ang merkado dahil sa tensiyon sa Iran/Hormuz
technical.body: Mag-uulat ang Alphabet/Amazon/Meta/Microsoft sa 4/29, ang Apple sa 4/30, lahat tumaas ng >10% MTD bago mag-print — — Bumagsak ang 4/27 futures dahil sa bagong escalation sa Strait of Hormuz: Dow Futures -0.17% (49,306), S&P -0.09%, Nasdaq -0.03%. Lima sa Mag 7 ang mag-uulat ngayong linggo, kung saan ang pinagsamang Q1 capex commentary mula sa Meta ($115B-$135B 2026 guide), Amazon (~$200B AWS-AI plan), at Alphabet ($175B-$185B) ang nakikita bilang — AI ROI reckoning — — lumipat ang narrative mula sa "rewarding capex on faith" papunta sa "demanding tangible profit." Hindi babaguhin ng Fed ang rates ngayong linggo (100% odds). — ****

technical.lead: Lumagpak ang Hermes Agent v0.11.0 "Interface" (4/23) na may buong React/Ink TUI rewrite, native AWS Bedrock, GPT-5.5 sa pamamagitan ng Codex OAuth
technical.body: 1,556 commits / 761 PRs / 224K insertions / 29 contributors — — Pinakamalaking update ng Nous Research hanggang sa kasalukuyan: pluggable transport architecture sa ilalim ng bawat provider, — 5 bagong inference paths — , ika-17 messaging platform (QQBot), shell hooks (pre/post tool call, on_session_start), zero-LLM webhook direct-delivery mode, configurable max_spawn_depth subagent orchestrator, file-coordination layer para sa concurrent siblings. Pagdating ng 4/23, lumampas na sa 95,600 GitHub stars sa loob ng 7 linggo. Stable na ang tool-gateway runtime patterns. — ****

technical.lead: Tuluy-tuloy ang inference-runtime + CI/CD CVE wave: CVE-2026-7037 Totolink RCE (CVSS 9.8, 4/26, public exploit) + CVE-2026-6951 simple-git RCE (CVSS 9.8, 4/26, foundational CI dependency) + hindi pa rin na-patch ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760
technical.body: 4/26 daily roll-up: — 31 high-priority + 19 actively exploited + simple-git RCE sa malawakang naka-deploy na Node.js CI/CD library — + — Totolink A8000RU pptpPassThru OS-command injection na may public PoC** + 4/27 LogonTracer CVE-2026-33277 (CVSS 8.8) + 4/27 GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility credential leak (CVE-2026-42363, CVSS 9.3). **Hindi pa rin na-patch** ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI matapos ang disclosure window.******

technical.lead: Sam Altman vs Anthropic tungkol sa Claude Mythos "fear-based marketing"
technical.body: lumalamig ang public opinion papasok sa IPO season — — Noong 4/21, ikinumpara ni Altman ang Mythos rollout sa "selling a bomb shelter while threatening to drop a bomb"; lumalala ang debate hanggang 4/26 sa background ng — physical attacks sa bahay ni Altman (4/16) — , — Mythos-leak via Discord/contractor URL-guessing**, at 4/15 CNBC public-opinion data sa AI/datacenter blowback. **Project Glasswing** roster confirmed na may 12 launch partners (AWS, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorganChase, Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Palo Alto Networks, Anthropic) + 40 critical-infrastructure orgs.******

technical.lead: Buksan ang SF AI Conference Season sa 4/28-29
technical.body: AI Dev 26 sa Pier 48 (3,000+ devs, Andrew Ng-hosted) + AI Tinkerers "Building Software Factories" VIP Dinner kasama ang Kiro at B-Capital (4/29) — — Sa Pier 48 Mission Bay magaganap ang flagship SF event ng DeepLearning.AI, sasakupin ang Agentic AI, Context Engineering, Multimodal Apps, AI Governance, at Coding-with-AI; ang invite-only dinner ng AI Tinkerers ay nagsasama-sama ng SDK ng Kiro Power at ng VC perspective ng B-Capital sa "software factory" thesis. Stanford follow-up: Causal Science Frontiers in AI Evaluation 4/29 + CORES Symposium 5/5 + SaaStr Annual 5/12-14 + AI DevSummit 5/27-28.
